Alert.mechanics: Add your Proficiency Bonus to your Initiative roll.
Alert.play_changes: Initiative Swap: Immediately after rolling, I can swap my initiative number with one willing ally in the same combat.

Crafter.play_changes: 20% discount when buying nonmagical items. Fast Crafting: Can craft one piece of gear from the Fast Crafting table during a Long Rest.

Healer.play_changes: Battle Medic: As a Utilize action, I can use a Healer's Kit to heal a creature within 5 ft. They roll one of their unspent Hit Point Dice; they heal that amount + my Proficiency Bonus. Healing Rerolls: Whenever I roll a die to heal someone (via spell or Battle Medic), I can reroll 1s, but I must use the new roll.

Lucky.mechanics: Resource Pool: Write down a pool of Luck Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus (recharges on a Long Rest).
Lucky.play_changes: Spend 1 Luck Point to give myself Advantage on a d20 roll, OR spend 1 point to impose Disadvantage on an attack roll made against me.

Magic Initiate.mechanics: Spells Known: Two Cantrips and one 1st-level spell chosen from either the Cleric, Druid, or Wizard spell list.
Magic Initiate.play_changes: Write down your chosen spellcasting ability for these spells (Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma). I can cast the 1st-level spell once for free per Long Rest. I can also cast it using my normal spell slots.

Musician.play_changes: Encouraging Song: After finishing a Short or Long rest, I can play a song to give Heroic Inspiration to a number of allies equal to my Proficiency Bonus.

Savage Attacker.play_changes: Once per turn when I hit a target with a weapon, I can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either result.

proficiencies: Any combination of three Skills or Tools

Tavern Brawler.mechanics: Unarmed Strike Damage: Write down your unarmed strike damage as 1d4 + your Strength modifier.
Tavern Brawler.play_changes: Reroll 1s on unarmed strike damage dice. Once per turn, if I hit with an unarmed strike as part of the Attack action, I can push the target 5 feet away.

Tough.mechanics: Hit Point Maximum: Immediately increase your Max HP by an amount equal to twice your character level.
Tough.play_changes: Every time I level up, my Hit Point Maximum increases by an additional +2.

Strixhaven Initiate.mechanics: Spells Known: Two Cantrips and one 1st-level spell designated by your specific Strixhaven College (e.g., Witherbloom grants Chill Touch, Druidcraft, and Cure Wounds or Inflict Wounds).
Strixhaven Initiate.play_changes: Write down your chosen spellcasting ability (Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma). You can cast the 1st-level spell once for free per Long Rest, and you can also cast it using your normal spell slots.
